disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Heavy nasal bleeding began spontaneously about an hour ago and has not stopped
trigger_question_examples: How long has it been going on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It just started on its own about an hour ago and it hasn't stopped since — it's soaked through several towels.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Firm continuous pressure on the soft part of the nose for about 45 minutes has not controlled the bleeding
trigger_question_examples: Have you tried pinching your nose?
Where and how long have you been pressing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been squeezing the soft part of my nose hard for about 45 minutes and it just keeps bleeding.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Blood is running down the back of the throat; the patient is swallowing it, has coughed up clots and vomited once
trigger_question_examples: Is any blood going down the back of your throat?
Have you been swallowing or coughing up blood?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, a lot of it is running down my throat. I've spat out some clots into a bowl and I was sick once bringing up swallowed blood.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The patient feels increasingly lightheaded and faint
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel dizzy or faint?
How are you feeling in yourself right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm feeling more and more lightheaded, like I might pass out if I stood up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The patient takes a daily low-dose aspirin
trigger_question_examples: Do you take any blood thinners or aspirin?
What regular medications are you on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I take a low-dose aspirin every day, and a ramipril tablet for my blood pressure.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The patient feels nauseated and notices his heart pounding
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel sick or notice your heart racing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My stomach feels off from swallowing all the blood, and I can feel my heart pounding.
